description_long: This is a large, modern residential house with a complex, multi-sectioned layout and a dark, shingled hip roof. The exterior walls are primarily white, with several rectangular windows distributed across all visible sides, some grouped in pairs or threes. The house features a spacious, fenced-in front courtyard with a wide gate, suggesting a private driveway or entry area. The structure includes multiple roof heights and sections, indicating a combination of single and double-story areas. The windows are mostly small and regularly shaped, and the main entryway is set back beneath a covered overhang. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A large, modern white house with a dark hip roof, multiple stories, and a spacious fenced courtyard. The design is clean and geometric, with regularly spaced windows and a covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large fenced courtyard, and the house's multi-sectioned roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, rectangular wing and the continuation of the fence along the courtyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back windows and the complex roofline with multiple heights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended fence, side windows, and the house's elongated structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door beneath a covered overhang, accessed from a large, open courtyard with a wide gate and minimal decorative elements.
